docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DOCUSIGN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,349.95 FILED BY GABAL, MOWAFAK AS TO DEFENDANT DOCUSIGN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MOWAFAK GABAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOCUSIGN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAIGE LAWSON. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GABAL, MOWAFAK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GABAL, MOWAFAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOCUSIGN INC. $6,830.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,905.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
